title: Hi. My name is varun. Who are you?

messages.content: Hi. My name is varun. Who are you?

Hi Varun! I'm your **Second Brain** — a personal knowledge assistant designed to remember things *for you*. Think of me as a living wiki that:

- 📝 **Stores** facts, ideas, projects, people, decisions, and preferences you share with me
- 🔍 **Retrieves** them accurately when you need them later
- 🔗 **Connects** related pieces of knowledge so nothing gets lost

The more you tell me, the more useful I become. You can ask me to remember anything, or just chat — I'll judge what's worth keeping and organize it automatically.

Let me save your name now!I've saved your name — nice to meet you, Varun! 👋 What would you like to tell me or ask about?

messages.content:
My full name is Varun Patkar. I am a A Data Engineer/Analyst exploring web development with technologies like Three.js and WebLLM, and leveraging AI.I have attached a few ss of my portfolio for you to extract info from. my socials:
https://www.linkedin.com/in/varun-patkar/, https://github.com/Varun-Patkar and https://x.com/Varun_Patkar
